title: Family Protection
description: Pair a protector with someone you're watching out for, send a panic alert, or practice spotting scams together.

pairing.heading: Pair devices
pairing.description: Link a protected person's ID with their protector's ID. Re-pairing updates the link, it never duplicates.

panic.heading: Panic trigger
panic.description: Broadcast a distress signal — to the paired protector if one exists, otherwise to public emergency channels.
panic.notifiedPublic: No protector paired — broadcast to public emergency channels.

training.heading: Scam-spotting practice
training.description: Get a real drill scenario, pick what you'd do, and see whether you got it right.
